entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The target legume crop used for genome-wide SNP generation and genotyping.

entities.name: SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms used as molecular markers to scan for seed yield signatures.

entities.name: GENOTYPING-BY-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A high-throughput sequencing method used to generate sequence reads for SNP discovery.

entities.name: MAD SNPS
entities.description: Multiple accessions-derived Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms efficient in detecting polymorphic potential.

entities.name: TAD SNPS
entities.description: Two accessions-derived Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms derived from desi ICC 4958 and kabuli CDC Frontier.

entities.name: SEED YIELD PER PLANT
entities.description: An agronomic trait (SYP) for which molecular signatures and phenotypic variation were analyzed.

entities.name: QTNS
entities.description: Quantitative trait nucleotides associated with phenotypic variation in seed yield.

entities.name: PPR GENE
entities.description: Pentatricopeptide repeat gene significantly associated with the seed yield per plant trait.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding method targeting useful agronomic traits using informative SNPs.

entities.name: VARIETAL IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving crop varieties using molecular markers.

entities.name: GENOMICS-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: The application of genomic information to develop high-yielding cultivars.

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC RELATIONSHIP
entities.description: The evolutionary relationship among desi and kabuli accessions.

entities.name: ALLELIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level of natural genetic variation within the chickpea accessions.
